title: xorg-x11-server-Xwayland update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
full_text:

- CVE fix for: CVE-2025-62229 (RHEL-119975), CVE-2025-62230 (RHEL-120020),
               CVE-2025-62231 (RHEL-125016)
